title: ogcodeia naga
side_effects: Ogcodeia naga can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Ingestion of excessive amounts can also cause cardiac problems, including irregular heartbeats and decreased blood pressure. Additionally, improper use of the ogcodeia naga plant can lead to skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, overuse of the plant can also cause respiratory failure and even death.
